category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a reverse proxy application based on Cloudflare Pingora; official GitHub repository says it is the home of the River reverse proxy application.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is river; official repository title and README use River for the reverse proxy project.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface found for the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already populated with https://github.com/memorysafety/river; per instruction it was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a reverse proxy based on Pingora; source_facts.executables lists river.
